'''Silais''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] who served as a [[Junior Representative/Legends|Representative]] for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]], he led the negotations for [[Cerea/Legends|Cerea]] to join the Republic.
